refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what the current sorting algorithm does and why it is not efficient. I should look at how packages are currently sorted by one attribute and think about how that could be improved.

The goal is to minimize the time packages spend in the sorting system. But I need to figure out how to measure that. Maybe I can look at how long it takes to sort packages now and compare it to my new algorithm.

The company has given me data on package dimensions, weight, and priority. I should decide which of these attributes are most important for sorting. I might need to ask the company how they want to prioritize these attributes.

I will have to make some assumptions since the company hasn't provided all the details. For example, I might assume that weight is more important than dimensions or that priority should affect sorting.
I should think about what improvements I can expect from my new algorithm. I might need to estimate how much faster it could be compared to the current method, but I am not sure how to do that yet.

I need to outline my report to include my new algorithm, the assumptions I made, the criteria for sorting, and how I think it will improve efficiency. I should probably include some charts or graphs if I can figure out how to present the data.
